expectations.text: The review identifies the missing await on db.orders.update()
The review explains the consequence (update may not complete, race condition, or unhandled rejection)
expectations.evidence: Lines 20-22: 'Fire-and-forget race condition: The email is sent immediately while the DB write may still be in flight... Unhandled promise rejection'

expectations.text: The review suggests adding await to db.orders.update()
expectations.evidence: Lines 24-27: 'await db.orders.update(orderId, { status: "processing", updatedAt: new Date() });'

claims.claim: The review additionally caught no email error handling, unsafe type assertion, and a missing idempotency/status guard
claims.evidence: Issues 2-4 on lines 31-91 cover email handling, type assertion, and idempotency
